rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE SUHIEL GEORGE SALFITI AND VICTORIA SUHEIL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Victoria Suheil Salfiti's motion to expunge lis pendens is GRANTED. Petitioners failed to comply with the service requirements of Code of Civil Procedure Section 405.22. Petitioners failed to show by a preponderance of the evidence the probable validity of their claim. Respondent's motion for monetary sanctions is DENIED. Respondent's motion for attorney's fees is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Respondent may file an amended motion for attorney's fees with appropriate evidentiary support (declaration, etc.) Respondent's motion for costs associated with the motion is GRANTED and respondent is awarded the $60 filing fee. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 1/13/2015. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order.
